items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate age restrictions requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of age restrictions (21+ for certain services), but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the age of customers or whether they meet the specified age requirement. The linked use case mentions age restrictions but lacks concrete evidence to confirm compliance with this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior step evidence does not address age verification, indicating a gap in the validation process.
